title: Senior Teacher - NSDC Global Group - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - NSDC Global Group - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at NSDC Global Group. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Teacher to strengthen our Pune-based team.

About NSDC Global Group:
NSDC Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Support students with special educational needs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Communication Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NSDC Global Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
